rag_rules: Place input assumptions in component type annexes when concrete bounds or visible relations are available
Use assign only for output features or auxiliary variables in implementation annexes
Avoid placing guarantees in implementation annexes
Use exact Boolean expressions only when the port is an AGREE bool in scope
generic_rules: Use named constants or visible relations for bounds in assumptions and guarantees
Align helper declaration types with expression types
Do not encode AADL properties as AGREE expressions unless explicitly exposed
Use eq for comparison expressions and bool for range_value declarations
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside annex agree blocks
Component type annexes are for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations
Implementation annexes are for bindings like assignments
Use value_in_range pattern for range comparisons
anti_patterns: Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not place guarantees in implementation annexes
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions
